name: Cinnamon Torte
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift the flour and cinnamon into a bowl or food processor.
2. Add the ground almonds, sugar, butter or margarine, and grated lemon rind.
3. Process without the plunger to allow more air for a light mixture, or rub the fat into the ingredients with your fingers.
4. Chill the dough in polythene wrap for 30 minutes before handling.
5. Preheat the oven to 180°C/350°F/Gas Mark 4.
6. Roll out two-thirds of the almond mixture on a lightly floured board to fit a 20 cm/8 inch flan tin.
7. Place the pastry in the tin and trim the edges.
8. Spread the raspberry jam over the pastry.
9. Roll out the remaining pastry, including the trimmings, and cut long strips to create a lattice across the top of the jam.
10. Bake the torte for 30 minutes, or until the pastry is set and lightly browned.
11. Serve hot or cold with a snowy topping of sifted icing sugar.
